/usr/bin/ar qc ../libs/linux64/release/libKromekDriver.a CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/CriticalSection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/D3DataProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/DeviceBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/DeviceMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/Event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/GR1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/IntervalCountProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/K102.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/Lock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/RadAngel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/RollingQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/SIGMA_25.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/SIGMA_50.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/Thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/TN15.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/GR05.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/DeviceEnumeratorLinux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/USBKromekDataInterfaceLinux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KromekDriver.dir/src/UNIBASE.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../libs/linux64/release/libKromekDriver.a
